{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/135201297?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/haruki3hhh", "id": 135201297, "login": "haruki3hhh", "node_id": "U_kgDOCA8CEQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/haruki3hhh", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "### Summary
In the auto-remediation pipeline, `object_to_execution.go` was deserializing the AI-generated YAML directly into a Deployment object, but there was lack of validation from the original Deployment object.

### Details
This issue was fixed after coordination with Alex Jones.

### PoC
To minimize the impact, the PoC of this vulnerability wasn't released, but was shared with the maintainers.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-24T16:37:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-24T16:37:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt/security/advisories/GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt/security-advisories/GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt", "summary": "k8sGPT has Prompt Injection through its k8sGPT-Operator", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T16:37:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rp7v-4384-hfrp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.4.32", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.4.32"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: k8sGPT has Prompt Injection through its k8sGPT-Operator
